subject: [PATCH v9 03/15] mm: rename uffd-wp PTE accessors to uffd

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch renames kernel internal names related to the uffd-wp PTE bit, which is reused for both write protection and access tracking. The rename affects various files in the Linux kernel, including header files, mm modules, and userfaultfd code. The changes are purely mechanical and do not introduce any new behavior. The patch aims to simplify the handling of this bit by making its meaning dependent on the VMA flag (WP or RWP) rather than its name.
